query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Kejriwal Criticizes Modi Government over E20 Petrol Experimentation
articles.description: AAP leader Arvind Kejriwal accuses the Indian government of forcibly imposing E20 petrol, causing vehicle damage and reduced fuel efficiency. He highlights public discontent and questions the government's decision amid conflicting statements regarding the policy's experimental nature. Kejriwal plans to address the issue with Prime Minister Modi.

articles.title: Does E20 petrol reduce mileage of your car, bike? Centre answers
articles.description: Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri has admitted E20 petrol may slightly impact vehicle mileage, but clarifies that drop is tied to multiple factors, not just ethanol.

articles.title: Skoda Kodiaq RS launched at Rs 66.99 lakh: First batch sold out in just 6 minutes
articles.description: Skoda has launched the performance-focused Kodiaq RS in India at an ex-showroom price of Rs. 66.99 lakh. Powered by a 265hp 2.0-litre turbo-petrol engine, the fully imported SUV accelerates from 0-100kmph in just 6.3 seconds.

articles.title: Food inflation projected to average 6% in FY27 amid rainfall deficit concerns: CareEdge Ratings
articles.description: India faces a challenging economic outlook with food inflation projected at 6% and CPI at 5% in FY27, largely due to a severe monsoon deficit impacting agriculture. Despite a widening non-oil trade deficit, strong services exports and a surge in FDI inflows are providing crucial support. Remittances also show robust growth, bolstering the economy. Government and RBI measures aim to stabilize the rupee, with crude oil prices expected around $90/bbl.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel rates today on July 3: Have OMCs slashed fuel prices? Check latest levels across Delhi, Mumbai, Noida - full list
articles.description: Petrol, diesel rates today on July 3: Have OMCs slashed fuel prices? Check latest levels across Delhi, Mumbai, Noida - full list

articles.title: State Fuel Retailers Lost ₹74,781 Cr in Q1, Says Oil Minister Puri
articles.description: State-run oil marketing companies in India suffered losses of ₹74,781 crore in April–June by selling fuel below market rates, even as Brent crude prices fall. Oil minister Hardeep Singh Puri remains noncommittal on cutting petrol and diesel prices, saying refiners are still processing higher-priced crude. Read how losses, global price trends, and private refiners like Nayara Energy could shape future fuel prices.

articles.title: Rupee rises 19 paise to 95.16 against US dollar in early trade
articles.description: Rupee appreciates 19 paise to 95.16 against the US dollar amid weaker dollar index and lower crude oil prices.

articles.title: Sensex Rises 550 Points, Nifty Gains 0.6% In Early Trade As IT Stocks Rally
articles.description: Benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty rose sharply in early trade, driven by gains in IT stocks and softer US jobs data that eased Fed tightening concerns. Global cues were positive, with Asian markets higher. Analysts cited cooling crude oil prices and moderating FII outflows as additional support for sentiment

articles.title: Sensex and Nifty Surge Amid Weak US Labor Data and Falling Crude Prices
articles.description: Indian stock markets opened strong with the Sensex up over 500 points and Nifty surpassing 24,300, driven by weak US labor data and falling crude oil prices. Investors are optimistic about a more accommodative US Federal Reserve policy. IT, metal, and telecom sectors, along with several prominent companies, led the gains.

articles.title: Cossacks, volunteers help keep order at petrol stations in Russian Black Sea resort
articles.description: July 3 - Cossacks and volunteers have stepped in to help city officials and police keep order and prevent conflicts at petrol stations in the popular Russian Black Sea resort of Anapa, as Ukrainian attacks worsen a countrywide fuel crisis. Read more at straitstimes.com.
